gourmet.topBarLead: Kaufen Sie Gourmet-Produkte online von über 1.037 ausgewählten Marken.

Hero.heading: Gourmet-Schätze, sorgfältig geliefert
Hero.paragraph: Ausgewählte Spezialitäten, kleine Erzeuger und Vorratsschätze bei Tramelle Source Gourmet.
Hero.cinematicSub: Ausgewählte Handwerksbetriebe, authentische Spezialitäten, sechs Sprachen, B2C und Chef Pro.

Checkout.pageDescription: Schließen Sie Ihre Bestellung auf Tramelle ab — Zahlung und Versand.

ProductSheet.shippingPoint1: Versandoptionen, Lieferzeiten und Kosten hängen vom Verkäufer und Zielort ab; beim Checkout sehen Sie die verfügbaren Optionen.
ProductSheet.shippingPoint2: Widerruf und Rückgabe richten sich nach geltendem Recht (z. B. 14 Tage in der EU, mit Ausnahmen u. a. für verderbliche oder aus Hygienegründen versiegelte Ware). Details in den AGB des Verkäufers.

Registration.hubMetaTitle: Sign up on Tramelle — Private, B2B buyer or Producer
Registration.hubMetaDescription: Create your Tramelle account. Shop gourmet products, access B2B prices or sell your artisan specialties.
Registration.producerMetaTitle: Sell your artisan specialties online | Tramelle Source Gourmet
Registration.producerMetaDescription: Bring your artisan products to Tramelle. Gourmet marketplace B2C and B2B, 6 languages, worldwide shipping. Apply as a producer.
Registration.producerHeroSub: Tramelle is the gourmet marketplace connecting artisan producers with consumers and buyers worldwide.
Registration.producerWhy2Text: Sell to end consumers and professional buyers.
Registration.producerWhy3Text: You set retail and wholesale prices.
Registration.producerWhy4Text: Pay on sales, aligned with the marketplace model.
Registration.producerHow1: Apply — fill in your company details
Registration.producerHow3: Onboarding — upload products and open your shop
Registration.producerHow4: Sell — manage orders, prices and catalog from your panel
Registration.producerFaq1Q: How much does it cost to sell on Tramelle?
Registration.producerFaq1A: Marketplace model: no fixed upfront fee; commercial terms are shared when you are approved.
Registration.producerFaq2A: Typically 48–72 business hours for a first response.
Registration.producerFaq3Q: Can I set different B2C and B2B prices?
Registration.producerFaq3A: Yes: separate price lists for consumers and professional buyers, within platform policies.
Registration.producerFaq4A: Logistics are defined in onboarding depending on your country and product category.
Registration.producerLinkBuyer: Are you a buyer? Discover Tramelle B2B
Registration.buyerMetaTitle: Buy gourmet products wholesale | Tramelle B2B
Registration.buyerMetaDescription: Access wholesale prices from selected artisan producers. Importers, retailers and buyers: join Tramelle B2B.
Registration.buyerHeroSub: Importers, retailers and professional buyers: access wholesale prices across the Tramelle catalog.
Registration.buyerHow3: Access — see wholesale prices set by each producer
Registration.buyerFaq1A: Usually company data, VAT and a commercial reference; more may be requested case by case.
Registration.buyerFaq2Q: Are B2B prices the same for all products?
Registration.buyerFaq2A: Each producer sets wholesale prices; they may vary by product and volume.
Registration.buyerFaq3A: Depends on producer and product (e.g. carton multiples); visible on the product page once B2B is approved.
Registration.buyerFaq4Q: Can I order from multiple producers in one checkout?
Registration.buyerFaq4A: Checkout can include multiple sellers; shipping follows each producer’s rules.
Registration.buyerLinkProducer: Are you a producer? Sell on Tramelle
Registration.formThanksBuyerBody: We will verify your profile within 24–48 hours.
Registration.errorSubmit: Submission failed. Please try again later.
